product.description:
• 360° Surveillance with Dual 2K Lenses (2K 3MP + 2K 3MP): Tapo C246D uses a fixed lens and a pan/tilt lens, ensuring clear visibility of all details. It covers different areas simultaneously, perfect for large outdoor spaces like yards, ponds, and farms, eliminating blind spots.
• Color Night Vision: See the night in vivid colors with the large aperture lens and built-in spotlights effective up to 40 feet (12m).
• Smart AI Detection: Smart AI technology detects and identifies people, pets, and vehicles, sending you only relevant notifications while effectively avoiding. unnecessary alerts
• IP65 Weatherproof: Mount securely in your desired placement under different weather conditions with IP65 weatherproofing.
• Local and Cloud Storage: Save recorded videos on a microSD Card (up to 512 GB, purchased separately) or use Tapo Care cloud storage services.(subscribe separately).
• Compact Design for Multiple Installation Methods: Upright, upside down, on a desk, wall-mounted, ceiling-mounted, or attached to a rod. This flexible design is ideal for both indoor and outdoor setups

metaData.Key Information: • 3-Years Limited Warranty

product.description:
- Capture highly detailed photos and videos with rich colors, even in challenging lighting conditions.
- Adapt your vlogging setup with a wide array of interchangeable lenses to achieve the perfect shot every time.
- Record ultra-clear 4K video with full pixel readout and no pixel binning, ensuring professional-grade footage.
- Capture crisp, clear audio with minimal background noise, ideal for outdoor vlogging scenarios.
- Easily create a stunning background blur effect with the press of a button, making your subject stand out.
- Benefit from rapid, precise autofocus with real-time Eye AF and subject tracking for both people and animals.
- Effortlessly compose your shots with the 3-inch flip-out touchscreen, perfect for selfies and creative angles.
- Instantly shift focus from your face to an item in front of the camera, perfect for product demonstrations and reviews.
- Enjoy easy portability with the ZV-E10’s compact design, making it the perfect companion for on-the-go creators.
- Stream live with ease, connecting directly to your audience, ideal for content creators and vloggers.

product.description: • The premium HB-Series Anamorphic Lens Mod for HERO13 Black takes the art of filmmaking to the next level. You’ll get cinematic, pro-quality footage with ultra wide-angle shots, distinctive horizontal anamorphic flares, reduced distortion and corner aberrations. In- camera “de-squeezing” makes editing anamorphic content easy. Simply attach the lens, and your camera will adjust its settings accordingly. The lens is durable, scratch-resistant and waterproof when installed.

product.description:
• 2K Dual Lens - Capture the full picture with dual 2K high definition optics, monitoring two separate areas at the same time with just one device. Engineered to minimize blind spots for optimal coverage.
• Wide-angle & Telephoto Lens - With 122° FOV wide-angle lens and 6mm telephoto lens, it ensures all-around awareness and down-to-the-detail protection of your home.
• Synchronized Smart Tracking - When the fixed lens detects events, the pan/tilt lens will automatically pivot to focus on and track the moving object.
• One-Tap Smart Focus - Select an area in the wide-angle view, and the pan/tilt camera will focus on it instantly.
• Free Smart Dual AI Detection & Notification - Get instant push notifications when motion, person, pets, vehicles or even baby cry are detected, there is no additional fee to use it.
• Works with Alexa, Google Home & Samsung SmartThings - Fully compatible with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant, use your simple voice command to view Tapo indoor/outdoor home security wi-fi camera live stream.
• Night Vision up to 40 ft -Even in complete darkness, an advanced IR algorithm delivers clear black-and-white footage.
• Secure Local or Cloud Storage - Save footage continuously on up to a 512 GB microSD card (not included) or subscribe to Tapo Care for cloud storage which saves 30-day video.
• 2-Way Audio - Engage in seamless, real-time conversations with our two-way audio feature, designed for minimal latency and exceptional sound clarity.

metaData.Key Information: • 3-Years Limited Warranty

product.description:
- Flagship dual-lens 8K gimbal camera bundle, pairs dual Leica Summicron lenses with 8K sensors and professional imaging chips
- Removable controller with 2-in. touchscreen lets you monitor framing and control the camera from up to 60 ft. away
- Wide-angle lens with 1-in. 8K sensor and telephoto lens with 1/1.3-in. sensor record in multiple formats, including - 8K/30 fps, 4K/120-fps Slow Motion, and 4K/60-fps Pure Video
12x zoom and 6x lossless zoom deliver crisp close-ups
- 4K/60-fps portrait videos and 4K Live Frame photos straight from the camera make creating and sharing stunning content easy
- Beauty Mode makes naturally radiant portraits easy with refined skin texture and brightened complexions
- Triple AI chip powers Deep Track subject tracking and focus
- Leica color profiles and cinematic filters provide legendary looks without complex color grading
- 10-bit I-Log with up to 14 stops of dynamic range gives you additional creative control while editing
- 3-axis gimbal ensures steady footage from either lens
Standard battery handle lasts up to 4 hrs. for day-long adventures
- Creator Bundle includes: protective cover, 1/4-in. thread handle, wrist strap, USB-C, Mic Pro transmitter, windshield, button magnet, clip, power grip, wide-angle lens, and carry bag

metaData.Key Information:
Leica 8K Dual-Lens Gimbal Camera Creator Bundle, Cosmic Black
1 Year Manufacturer Warranty
